video_title: How to make Coconut Wax Candles at home

windows.transcript: Place a week into the wax keeping it to the centre of each jar. You'll want to use a 60 ply cotton braided wick number
windows.embed_text_v2: set cream coconut wax candles in clear glass jars with centered upright white cotton wick, smooth solidified pale wax surface, decorative flowers, finished wicked container candles
windows.summary_v2: Close-up panning shots of set pale cream coconut-wax candles in clear glass jars, each with a centered upright white cotton wick.

tags_v2.action: showing wicked set candle in jar
tags_v2.setting: styled tabletop with dried flowers and cork, woven mat

seconds_v2.desc: Close-up of a set pale cream candle in a small clear glass jar with a white cotton wick standing centered; a second wicked jar candle sits behind, soft pink and red-checked background.
Tight shot looking down into the glass jar candle; the smooth solidified cream-colored coconut wax surface holds an upright white wick at center.
Camera pans across the curved glass jar of pale set wax, decorative lilac flowers visible at the lower right edge.
Extreme close-up of the glossy cream wax jar body with rustic orange leaves and purple flowers framing the left side.
The pale jar candle fills the frame against a woven mat; dried flowers and a cork coaster sit beside it.
Very tight, blurred pan over the smooth creamy wax surface of the candle.
Close-up rising to the rim of a clear glass jar filled with set pale yellow-cream wax, a white wick emerging at center, second jar at right.
Looking into the mouth of the glass jar candle, the solidified cream wax surface and upright white cotton wick clearly in focus.
Two finished cream-colored set candles in clear glass jars side by side, each with a centered white wick, on a pale pink surface.
